content.full_text:
Linda Goldberg  
649-8 Woodside Sierra  
Sacramento, CA 95825  
(916) 327-4041  
(916) 485-5504 (home)  
January 28, 1991

Blanca Breeze  
Legal Department  
FPPC  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Blanca:

Per your request, I am attaching information from the Editor of the book, as well as information about the book for which I will be volunteering my assistance as a contributing editor. I will be providing information for a travel book, which may be incorporated by the Editor into the text. I will not be writing any complete entry for the book.

I have been providing newspaper articles on hotels, B&Bs, and inns throughout the United States and Canada to Sandra Soule for over a year on a voluntary basis. We only just recently met in person.

I am assured that complimentary or discounted accommodations, if offered by the establishments, would also be arranged for others whom Ms. Soule trusts to handle such an assignment. As Ms. Soule and her employees work out of their homes, her operation is very low-budget, and she regularly relies on readers and contributing editors to assist her in providing updating information on the establishments listed in the books.

If I can provide any further information, I can be reached at 327-4041 on January 28, and then at 485-5504 (home) from January 29 until March 4. Also, feel free to contact Sandra Soule at (203) 637-7642.

I would like to have written advice as soon as possible, as we need to make travel arrangements for the week of February 3. Could I also be phoned so I can start making the arrangements?

Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,

[signature] Linda Goldberg

lg  
Attachments - 11 pages
